payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Dark reddish-brown mahogany cabinet/sideboard with a glossy lacquer finish, visible narrow top drawers and paneled lower doors with small round brass/gold knobs; decorative molding along the top edge and a terracotta plant pot sitting on the top surface; the right and lower edges of the unit are cropped in the image indicating a partial view; appears approximately 1.0 m from the camera.
